title: Best Indian Films of 2025 — Navras Ranked
description: Kantara Chapter 1, Saiyaara, Lokah and more — every major Indian film of 2025 ranked by Navras.
intro: 2025 was a year of contrasts in Indian cinema. Mainstream Bollywood leaned into familiarity while Malayalam cinema continued to set the pace. Here are the films that actually mattered.

entries.blurb: The follow-up to one of India's most culturally impactful films.

film.title: Kantara: A Legend Chapter 1
film.verdict: The most anticipated follow-up in Indian cinema history.

entries.blurb: The highest-grossing Malayalam film ever made. Spectacular.

film.title: Lokah
film.verdict: The highest-grossing Malayalam film ever made. Spectacular.

entries.blurb: The romantic comeback Bollywood needed. Ahaan Panday announces himself.

film.title: Saiyaara
film.verdict: Most searched film of 2025 — and it earns the attention.

entries.blurb: Ranveer Singh's best performance since Gully Boy.
The most heartwarming Indian film of the year.

film.title: Superboys of Malegaon
film.verdict: The most heartwarming Indian film of the year.
